violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line microwaves.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean racks and shelving in walk in coolers. -Clean fan covers in walk in coolers. -Clean door gasket on line freezer. -Clean shelf by salad prep. -Clean high shelving above cook and server station line.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors and walls in kitchen need more thorough cleaning.
